summary: The implementation covers most requirements with strong adherence to the design system, navigation, forms, backend structure, admin features, and real-time updates. However, there are notable missing features including Excel export functionality (only CSV export is implemented), in-place table editing in Admin Dashboard, and some animation specifications. Several hallucinated features include profile setup, user profile management, and a footer that were not requested.

missing_requirements.requirement: Create Excel export feature with 'Export Full Report' button that generates SAID_Raya_Trip_2026_Full_Report.xlsx containing three sheets
missing_requirements.reason: The AdminDashboard.tsx shows an 'Export CSV' button instead of 'Export Full Report', and references exportToExcel but the actual implementation appears to be CSV-based, not Excel with three sheets as specified

missing_requirements.requirement: Table rows are editable in place in Admin Dashboard
missing_requirements.reason: The AdminDashboard.tsx shows a table but no evidence of in-place editing functionality. The table appears to be display-only with delete actions

missing_requirements.requirement: Each field appears with fade-in animation staggered by 0.08 seconds
missing_requirements.reason: DaftarKeluarga.tsx contains the dynamic member name fields but no evidence of staggered fade-in animation with 0.08s delay for each field

hallucinated_features.description: User profile management system with ProfileSetup component and profile saving/loading hooks
hallucinated_features.reason: ProfileSetup.tsx component and profile-related backend functions were implemented but not requested in requirements. Non-goals explicitly state 'User registration system for non-admin family members'

hallucinated_features.description: Application footer with copyright and caffeine.ai attribution
hallucinated_features.reason: A footer element with copyright notice and external link was added in App.tsx but was not specified in any requirement

hallucinated_features.description: Search functionality with Search icon in Admin Dashboard
hallucinated_features.reason: While REQ-13 mentions search functionality, the implementation includes a Search icon component which adds visual elements beyond the basic requirement
